## What does this change

A short description of the change and why.

## Type

- [ ] New platform
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No em-dash in code, docs, comments, prompts, or example text
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or the CLI changed
- [ ] For a new platform or template, added a registry entry and a test

## Notes

Screenshots of rendered output are welcome.
